textByHash.028cac0c2167284b27f4dfdabfe585ce84a2f9c0: How very industrious of you, agent. Please hand them over.
textByHash.0416a40a92bd64dc5d37b280dcc46bc3129dcbd1: The fish cannot ride the gravy train.
textByHash.0b17b9690d767c0445a316a175679f191eeab4b3: I don't care if your vibes are harmonious!
textByHash.0b5a068091b5f78ee0b20f266d7c8005b5c08cf0: I am satisfied with your reports. You just need to complete a physical and you will be free to roam at your leasure.
textByHash.1852283bd90ebb9edc7565ec2486b8354a5c9a05: Hmm, we shall have to research this.
textByHash.24d2d57cedd818d318966137543e0722f8616193: Waddle into a sunset of flaking mackerel?
textByHash.2be201e2c99ad7797c718d9dc2fd9c54d72e717b: Once inside, go into the room to the left. You'll be debriefed there. No dawdling!
textByHash.2df5d0fb0722845526b15baecad2e9fbdd78ec50: Oh no. It's an agility course to make sure you're still fit and able to serve. Don't worry, I'm sure you won't have any difficulty getting through it. Just go through the door at the end of the room.
textByHash.3093f20e6ab280da6249aaff5273a0034c174f22: This could be very useful during battle.
textByHash.382b928a21e84fc9a281c2ca80619edcd33a047b: There's been a breach! Red alert!
textByHash.53eeea8d46fb66cf513d3fb0cb2a0b91baf2f28b: The cyclops cannot see his inner walrus?
textByHash.5525e976a6d9e6e63aeba49374378e97d3fa7054: So you have just returned from your mission?
textByHash.698679a0d395a0817cb7ccbeafe71aa87e78c91c: Phew, that was a close call.
textByHash.725ca0f27bbec2ad248479a8d54e20be38f67600: You flew in a 'hot air balloon'? What is that exactly?
textByHash.746ab270faeab6c2064a42eeba29aefccfc00d3e: It says you jumped off a hill and flew? Without assistance?
textByHash.792edeb89def73014355b9637e3fbf64357a2d75: The sardine is leaving the tin?
textByHash.7db5f6bb7704e588c3ffc27614e7535dc8c6d9a1: Did you really get launched out of a cannon? It seems quite risky.
textByHash.a38e3bf82351b0276fa9409a258c6e3995c6f4fc: I'm sorry comrade, you do not have the clearance to go through these doors.
textByHash.ab31cad398997d962abb9c72ae8cc4918706d198: Shut those instruments up or I'm throwing you in solitary!
textByHash.b028eede422a82b327209bf067ed6bae2c0172eb: All right, you can go in. The entrance is hidden under that avalanche.
textByHash.c47be82378891381f0b6b10368e3d09728f045cc: INTRUDER! Red alert! Batten down the hatches! DIVE, DIVE, DIVE!
textByHash.cd4303f23a5a7b4824133d1c90f3adba5c5f3caa: Don't stand around, agent. You look absurd.
textByHash.d8779b649440b66a5a0fa4b1fd6441f663ef1abf: Let's see your ID and you can go through.
